suppliers.name: Sasko bakery route
suppliers.notes: Driver arrives early (typically 06:00-08:00). Take a bigger drop on Friday and Saturday for the weekend rush. No Sunday route. Transport is free — built into the loaf price.

suppliers.name: Coca-Cola SA depot
suppliers.notes: Phone order by 14:00 the day before delivery. Free delivery on orders over R500. Bigger discount on full-case (24) orders, volume discount kicks in at 3+ cases.

suppliers.name: Simba (PepsiCo) rep
suppliers.notes: Rep route is weekly — miss the Wednesday window and you wait a full week. Confirm order Monday or Tuesday morning. Free delivery on minimum R300 orders.

suppliers.name: Jumbo Cash & Carry
suppliers.notes: Owner collects in person. Tue and Wed mornings beat the weekend rush — better stock and shorter queues. Typical taxi fare per trip ≈ R80. Saturday is a tax on your time.
